scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[1] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings after MATCH and OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [1] Filter node with node label predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings after MATCH and OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a)-->(b)
WHERE b:B
OPTIONAL MATCH (a)-->(c)
WHERE c:C
RETURN a.name

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[2] Filter node with false node label predicate after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [2] Filter node with false node label predicate after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r]-(m)
WHERE m:NonExistent
RETURN r

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[3] Filter node with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.description: [3] Filter node with property predicate on multi variables with multiple bindings after OPTIONAL MATCH
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n:Single)
OPTIONAL MATCH (n)-[r]-(m)
WHERE m.num = 42
RETURN m

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[4] Do not fail when predicates on optionally matched and missed nodes are invalid
scenarios.description: [4] Do not fail when predicates on optionally matched and missed nodes are invalid
scenarios.query:
MATCH (n)-->(x0)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x0)-->(x1)
WHERE x1.name = 'bar'
RETURN x0.name

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[5] Matching and optionally matching with unbound nodes and equality predicate in reverse direction
scenarios.description: [5] Matching and optionally matching with unbound nodes and equality predicate in reverse direction
scenarios.query:
MATCH (a1)-[r]->()
WITH r, a1
  LIMIT 1
OPTIONAL MATCH (a2)<-[r]-(b2)
WHERE a1 = a2
RETURN a1, r, b2, a2

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[6] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – OPTIONAL MATCH and WHERE
scenarios.description: [6] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – OPTIONAL MATCH and WHERE
scenarios.query:
MATCH (x:X)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x)-[:E1]->(y:Y)
WHERE x.val < y.val
RETURN x, y

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[7] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – OPTIONAL MATCH on two relationships and WHERE
scenarios.description: [7] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – OPTIONAL MATCH on two relationships and WHERE
scenarios.query:
MATCH (x:X)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x)-[:E1]->(y:Y)-[:E2]->(z:Z)
WHERE x.val < z.val
RETURN x, y, z

scenarios.id: MatchWhere6 - Filter optional matches-[8] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – Two OPTIONAL MATCH clauses and WHERE
scenarios.description: [8] Join nodes on non-equality of properties – Two OPTIONAL MATCH clauses and WHERE
scenarios.query:
MATCH (x:X)
OPTIONAL MATCH (x)-[:E1]->(y:Y)
OPTIONAL MATCH (y)-[:E2]->(z:Z)
WHERE x.val < z.val
RETURN x, y, z
